info.title: OpenSanctions
info.description: The OpenSanctions API lets you search and query the global sanctions and politically exposed persons (PEP) database. It provides endpoints for entity matching, text search, entity retrieval, and granular statement-level data. Use it to check people or companies against sanctions lists or explore the OpenSanctions entity graph.

post.x-ms-summary: Match entities by name, DOB, and nationality
post.description: Use this endpoint to match people or companies against a dataset using fuzzy name, date of birth, and nationality criteria. Returns scored match results with confidence thresholds.

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: Dataset or collection name to run the match query on.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matches to return (1�500).

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Minimum score to include a result (0�1).

parameters.name: cutoff
parameters.description: Minimum acceptable score for best match cutoff.

parameters.name: algorithm
parameters.description: Matching algorithm to use, e.g., logic-v1.

parameters.name: include_dataset
parameters.description: Datasets to explicitly include in the match.

parameters.name: exclude_schema
parameters.description: Schemas to exclude from the match process.

parameters.name: exclude_dataset
parameters.description: Datasets to exclude from the match process.

parameters.name: topics
parameters.description: Restrict matches to entities tagged with these topics.

parameters.name: changed_since
parameters.description: Only include entities changed since this ISO date.

parameters.name: exclude_entity_ids
parameters.description: Entity IDs to ignore during matching. Use to filter false positives or previously reviewed entities.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: Content type of the request body (application/json).

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: EntityMatchQuery payload defining entities to match.

get.x-ms-summary: Text-based entity search by name or keyword
get.description: Use this endpoint to search entities by name or keyword within a dataset. Supports field filters, fuzzy matching, and optional faceting.

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: Dataset or collection to search within.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Text to search for, such as a name or keyword.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Restrict results to a specific schema (e.g., Person).

parameters.name: include_dataset
parameters.description: Only return entities from these datasets.

parameters.name: exclude_dataset
parameters.description: Exclude entities from these datasets.

parameters.name: exclude_schema
parameters.description: Exclude entities of these schema types.

parameters.name: changed_since
parameters.description: Only include entities updated since this ISO date.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Filter by country codes (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

parameters.name: topics
parameters.description: Restrict results to entities tagged with topics.

parameters.name: datasets
parameters.description: Filter by dataset identifiers.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Use syntax 'field:value' to filter fields, e.g., properties.birthDate:1985.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1�500).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for paged results.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort results by field, e.g., score:desc.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Deprecated. Use the 'topics' parameter instead.

parameters.name: fuzzy
parameters.description: Enable fuzzy text matching (approximate search).

parameters.name: simple
parameters.description: Simplify results by skipping detailed metadata.

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Return facet counts for these fields.

parameters.name: filter_op
parameters.description: Logic to combine multiple filters (AND/OR).

get.x-ms-summary: Basic health check for service availability
get.description: Returns a simple status response confirming the API is reachable and operational. Commonly used by monitoring tools or Kubernetes liveness probes.

get.x-ms-summary: Confirms if the search index is fully built
get.description: Returns the status of the search index to indicate whether the API is ready to handle queries. Useful for monitoring startup and deployment readiness.

200.description: Index is ready and service is operational.

503.description: Index is still building or unavailable.

get.x-ms-summary: Lists available matching and scoring algorithms
get.description: Retrieves a list of all supported matching and scoring algorithms used by the API for entity comparison and result ranking.

post.x-ms-summary: Rebuilds the search index using an update token
post.description: Triggers a manual rebuild of the search index. Requires a valid update token for authorization. Use this to refresh the dataset when data or structure changes occur.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: API token required to authorize index rebuild.

parameters.name: sync
parameters.description: Run synchronously and wait for index completion.

200.description: Index rebuild started or completed successfully.

get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve a single entity by its unique identifier
get.description: Returns the full record for an entity specified by its ID, including related data such as ownership, associations, and linked properties.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the entity to retrieve.

parameters.name: nested
parameters.description: Include linked or related entities in the response.

schema.description: Dynamic JSON object. Allows all field types without validation.

308.description: Entity was merged into another ID.

404.description: Entity not found or no longer exists.

get.summary: Get entities adjacent to an entity
get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve related entities such as links, owners, or associates
get.description: Returns entities connected to the specified entity, such as linked people, companies, identifiers, or sanctions. Useful for exploring graph relationships in the OpenSanctions dataset.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the entity whose connections to retrieve.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort results by field, e.g., score:desc.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related entities to return (1�500).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for paginated related entities.

308.description: Entity was merged into another ID.

500.description: Internal server error retrieving related entities.

get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve adjacent entities linked by a specific property
get.description: Returns entities related to a given entity through a specific property, such as ownership, family ties, or identifiers. Useful for exploring graph relationships in detail.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the entity whose related items to fetch.

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: Property name used to fetch related entities.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort related entities by field, e.g., score:desc.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related entities to return (1�500).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for paginated related results.

schema.description: Dynamic JSON structure reprsenting related entities. Each property may contain arrays of strings or nested entity objects.

308.description: Entity was merged into another ID.

500.description: Internal server error retrieving related entities.

get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve the list of all indexed datasets
get.description: Returns the full service catalog containing all available and indexed datasets in the OpenSanctions API. Useful for discovering dataset names and metadata.

get.x-ms-summary: Retrieve raw data records from the statement model
get.description: Returns granular entity data as individual statements from the OpenSanctions database. Each statement represents a single fact (e.g., name, address, birth date) extracted from source data.

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: Limit results to statements from this dataset.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Return statements linked to this entity ID.

parameters.name: canonical_id
parameters.description: Fetch statements for the canonical entity ID.

parameters.name: prop
parameters.description: Filter statements by property name.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Filter statements containing this property value.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Restrict statements to entities of a given schema.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort results by field, e.g., timestamp:desc.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of statements to return (1�5000).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for paginated results.

get.x-ms-summary: Bulk match entities via OpenRefine-compatible API
get.description: Provides a reconciliation endpoint compatible with the Google Refine (OpenRefine) API. Use this to bulk match or verify entity names against a dataset from an external tool such as OpenRefine.

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: Dataset or collection name to reconcile against.

200.description: Reconciliation metadata or match results returned.

422.description: Validation failed for one or more parameters.

name.description: Name of the matching or scoring algorithm.

description.description: Short description of what the algorithm does.

ConfigVar.title: ConfigVar
ConfigVar.description: A configuration variable for a scoring algorithm.

description.description: Explanation of what this configuration variable controls.

default.description: Default value for this configuration variable, if any.

ConfigVarType.title: ConfigVarType
ConfigVarType.description: The type of a configuration variable.

DataCoverage.title: DataCoverage
DataCoverage.description: Details on the temporal and geographic scope of a dataset.

start.description: The start date of the dataset coverage period.

end.description: The end date of the dataset coverage period.

countries.description: List of ISO country codes covered by the dataset.

schedule.description: Optional schedule or cron expression for dataset updates.

DataPublisher.title: DataPublisher
DataPublisher.description: Publisher information, eg. the government authority.

DataResource.title: DataResource
DataResource.description: A downloadable resource that is part of a dataset.

matcher.description: Information about the matcher that was used to score this request. Deprecated, use `/algorithms` endpoint instead.

FeatureDoc.title: FeatureDoc
FeatureDoc.description: Documentation for a particular feature in the matching API model.

FtResult.title: FtResult
FtResult.description: A explained score for a particular feature result.

features.description: A dictionary of subscores from features in the algorithm. Deprecated, use `explanations` instead.

explanations.description: A dictionary of subscores from features in the algorithm and explanations for how they were calculated.

match.description: Whether the score is above the match threshold.

YenteDatasetModel.title: YenteDatasetModel
YenteDatasetModel.description: Represents a dataset within OpenSanctions, including its metadata, coverage, resources, and related datasets.

license.description: License under which the dataset is published.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last dataset update.

entity_count.description: Total number of entities included in the dataset.

thing_count.description: Total number of non-entity objects in the dataset.

tags.description: Keywords or topics associated with the dataset.

resources.description: List of resources included in the dataset.

children.description: Child datasets derived from this dataset.

entities_url.description: API URL for accessing entity data.

delta_url.description: API URL for accessing delta (update) data.

namespace.description: Indicates if the dataset defines its own namespace.

Coverage.title: Coverage
Coverage.description: Describes the temporal, geographic, and update coverage of a dataset.

start.description: The start date of the dataset coverage period.

end.description: The end date of the dataset coverage period.

countries.description: List of ISO country codes covered by the dataset.

schedule.description: Optional schedule or cron expression for dataset updates.

Operator1.title: Operator1
Operator1.description: Logic to use when combining multiple filters on the same field (topics, countries, datasets). Please specify AND for new integrations (to override a legacy default) and when building a faceted user interface.

tags.name: Matching
tags.description: Endpoints for conducting a user-facing entity search or matching a local data store against the given dataset.

tags.name: System information
tags.description: Service metadata endpoints for health checking and getting the application metadata to be used in client applications.

tags.name: Data access
tags.description: Endpoints for fetching data from the API, either related to individual entities, or for bulk data access in various forms.

tags.name: Reconciliation
tags.description: The Reconciliation Service provides four separate endpoints that work in concert to implement the data matching API used by OpenRefine, Wikidata and several other services and utilities.
